name: Weedle
description: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Pansage
description: It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Chespin
description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

name: Quilladin
description: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators' attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Chesnaught
description: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.

attacks.name: Tumbling Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Slugma
description: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

name: Pansear
description: Very intelligent, it roasts berries before eating them. It likes to help people.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Fennekin
description: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Braixen
description: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.

attacks.name: Firebreathing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Delphox
description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Panpour
description: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. It waters plants with it using its tail.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Froakie
description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

name: Frogadier
description: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

attacks.name: Aqua Wave
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Greninja
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

attacks.name: Mat Block
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Clauncher
description: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.

name: Poochyena
description: A Pokémon with a persistent nature, it chases its chosen prey until the prey becomes exhausted.

name: Mightyena
description: It will always obey the commands of a skilled Trainer. Its behavior arises from its living in packs in ancient times.

attacks.name: Hard Bite
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Inkay
description: Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.

name: Pawniard
description: Blades comprise this Pokémon's entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.

name: Bisharp
description: This pitiless Pokémon commands a group of Pawniard to hound prey into immobility. It then moves in to finish the prey off.

attacks.name: Wicked Jab
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Honedge
description: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

attacks.name: Continuous Slash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Snubbull
description: It has an active, playful nature. Many women like to frolic with it because of its affectionate ways.

name: Granbull
description: It is timid in spite of its looks. If it becomes enraged, however, it will strike with its huge fangs.

attacks.name: Double Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Swirlix
description: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.

attacks.name: Draining Kiss
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Farfetch'd
description: The plant stalk it holds is its weapon. The stalk is used like a sword to cut all sorts of things.

name: Snorlax
description: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

attacks.name: Rock Smash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Miltank
description: If it is around babies, it milk it produces contains much more nutrition than usual.

attacks.name: Sitdown Splash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Skitty
description: It can't stop itself from chasing moving things, and it runs in a circle, chasing its own tail.

attacks.name: Jump On
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Bidoof
description: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

name: Bunnelby
description: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.

name: Fletchling
description: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.

attacks.name: Razor Wind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Furfrou
description: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.

attacks.name: Tight Jaw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Furfrou
description: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.

attacks.name: Tight Jaw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Crushing Hammer
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Poké Ball
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Pokémon Catcher
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with his or her Active Pokémon.

name: Potion
effect: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

name: Switch
effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
